{
  "title": "Oval Diamond Solitaire Engagement Ring",
  "description": "Classic solitaire engagement ring featuring an 18K gold band with a four-prong setting holding an oval-cut diamond center stone. The band has a comfort-fit interior with a slightly tapered shank that narrows toward the setting. The oval diamond measures approximately 8mm x 6mm (1.5 carat equivalent) and is secured by decorative double-claw prongs.",
  "dimensions": {
    "width": 8.5,
    "height": 7.2,
    "depth": 20.5
  },
  "features": [
    "Oval-cut diamond center stone with 58 facets",
    "Four double-claw prong setting with decorative gallery",
    "2.5mm comfort-fit band with tapered shoulders",
    "Polished 18K gold finish",
    "Open cathedral-style undergallery for light enhancement",
    "Sizing markers for ring size adjustment",
    "Rounded interior edges for comfortable wear"
  ],
  "material": "18K Gold with Diamond",
  "file_format": "STEP",
  "complexity": "complex"
